name: multi-statement
description: Multi-step mutation and query workflows — verify state consistency.

cases.name: insert_then_count
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE N(id INT64, PRIMARY KEY(id))

cases.name: update_then_read
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Person(name STRING, score INT64, PRIMARY KEY(name))

cases.name: delete_then_count
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE N(id INT64, PRIMARY KEY(id))

cases.name: create_rel_then_traverse
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Person(name STRING, PRIMARY KEY(name))
CREATE REL TABLE Likes(FROM Person TO Person)

cases.name: multiple_sets
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Item(id INT64, val INT64, PRIMARY KEY(id))

cases.name: bulk_insert_with_aggregate
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Metric(id INT64, value DOUBLE, PRIMARY KEY(id))

cases.name: interleaved_create_and_read
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Seq(id INT64, PRIMARY KEY(id))
cases.query: MATCH (s:Seq) RETURN s.id ORDER BY s.id

cases.name: parameterized_update
setup: CREATE NODE TABLE Player(name STRING, score INT64, PRIMARY KEY(name))
